frontmatter.title: Two-factor authentication via Google Authenticator
frontmatter.perex: The need for authentication mechanisms that provide more security has been rising during the recent years. Google has ventured into this field with their Authenticator application which is now used not only by Google itself, but also other big players like Github or Dropbox. And you know what? It's not really that difficult to join this elite group. I'm going to show you how.

frontmatter.title: Blazing fast file upload through Nginx
frontmatter.perex: Implementing a shiny new feature for one of our clients, we faced a challenging task. We needed to handle uploads of loads of files. Effectively. Without torturing the server with unnecessary stuff.

frontmatter.title: Brand new jiripudil.cz
frontmatter.perex: Earlier this week, I launched a brand new version of this website. It is written in PHP using Nette and Doctrine, uses Bower and Gulp to build assets, and strives to follow current best practices. And, last but definitely not least, its source code is open.

frontmatter.title: Configuring Nginx and PHP-FPM (and Nette)
frontmatter.perex: This text provides a comprehensive guide on how to configure Nginx and PHP-FPM and make it run smoothly with Nette framework.

frontmatter.title: Shared component factories using traits
frontmatter.perex: Do components shared across multiple presenters bloat your BasePresenter? Well, PHP 5.4 comes with a solution to this, with these snippets of reusable code called traits.
